ui.hero_desc: A suite of modern tools designed to help you learn, read, and write Ancient Greek with precision and beauty.

letras.title: Letters
letras.desc: Master the Ancient Greek alphabet with interactive drills.

vocabulario.title: Vocabulary
vocabulario.desc: Master the most frequent words in Ancient Greek literature.

memory.title: Memory
memory.desc: Match letters, names, and symbols in this classical game.

lectura.title: Reading
lectura.desc: Practice reading classical texts with interactive assistant tools.

letras.title: Letters & Sounds
letras.desc: Train your ear to recognize the sounds of the classical Greek alphabet. Listen carefully and select the correct letter.

vocabulario.title: Frequent Vocabulary
vocabulario.desc: Master the building blocks of Ancient Greek by learning the most common words found in classical literature.

lectura.title: Interactive Reading
lectura.desc: Improve your reading and listening skills with word-by-word assistant.

ui.tip: Tip: Hover over words to see their individual translations.

sentences.translation: In the beginning was the Word.

memory.title: Classical Memory
memory.desc: Match letters, names, and symbols in this classical game. Select one of each category to make a full set.

settings.title: Game Settings
settings.difficult_note: Note: Selecting more columns makes the game significantly harder!

memory.instructions: Pick one of each category to make a set

phonetic.title: Greek Letters
phonetic.instruction: Listen to the sound and pick the correct letter

vocabulary.instruction: Match the Greek word with its translation
vocabulary.title: Frequent Words
